title: Governance Rule
description: Schema defining the structure of a governance rule within the Agent OS Constitution. Each rule represents a binding principle, policy, or behavioral constraint.

rule_id.description: Unique identifier for this governance rule.

title.description: Human-readable name of the governance rule.

description.description: Detailed explanation of the rule's purpose and scope.

category.description: Classification of the rule (e.g., safety, security, coordination, hygiene).

authority_level.description: The level of authority this rule holds within the governance hierarchy.

enforcement.description: How strictly this rule must be followed.

related_governance.description: List of related governance files (e.g., constitution/other-rule.md).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the rule was first defined.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the rule was last modified.
